B) Bernard: Bernard... Maybe Bernard Buffet? He was a French painter, but again, not the most well-known. Or Bernard Delmotte? Not sure. I don't think Bernard is a common name among the most famous painters. C) Vincent: Oh! Vincent van Gogh! That's one of the most famous painters ever. So Vincent is definitely a name that matches. So if there's a penguin named Vincent, that's the answer. D) Gwen: Gwen... Maybe Gwen John? She was a Welsh painter, but again, not as famous as Van Gogh.
